task_completion.description: Access the GNU Health system at the provided URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser is open to http://localhost:8000/ and displays the GNU Health login screen or main dashboard.

task_completion.description: Register a new Institution named 'PetroChem Occupational Health Clinic'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved record or list view in the GNU Health interface showing an Institution with the exact name 'PetroChem Occupational Health Clinic'.

task_completion.description: Create a Hospital Ward named 'Decontamination & Observation Ward' linked to the institution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved record or list view in the GNU Health interface showing a Hospital Ward named 'Decontamination & Observation Ward', with an indication that it is linked to the 'PetroChem Occupational Health Clinic' institution.

task_completion.description: Create a Hospital Bed named 'DECON-1' linked to the ward.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved record or list view in the GNU Health interface showing a Hospital Bed named 'DECON-1', with an indication that it is linked to the 'Decontamination & Observation Ward'.

task_completion.description: Create a Hospital Bed named 'DECON-2' linked to the ward.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A saved record or list view in the GNU Health interface showing a Hospital Bed named 'DECON-2', with an indication that it is linked to the 'Decontamination & Observation Ward'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health web interface to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the GNU Health web GUI (forms, buttons, menus) rather than terminal commands, SQL queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The records are created within the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The records must be visible inside the GNU Health application interface, not typed into a text editor, notes app, or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to insert records directly into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no open terminal windows showing psql or other database client commands executing INSERT statements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected institution name is exactly 'PetroChem Occupational Health Clinic'. The expected ward name is exactly 'Decontamination & Observation Ward'. The expected bed names are exactly 'DECON-1' and 'DECON-2'.
